segments.speaker: TIM
segments.en: Good morning.
segments.zh: 早上好，这里是旅游信息办公室，我是蒂姆。有什么可以帮您的吗？

segments.speaker: TIM
segments.en: You're through to the tourist information office, Tim speaking.

segments.speaker: TIM
segments.en: How can I help you?

segments.speaker: JEAN
segments.en: Oh hello.
segments.zh: 哦你好。能给我一些关于下个月节日的信息吗？我和家人那周会住在镇上。

segments.speaker: JEAN
segments.en: Could you give me some information about next month's festival, please?

segments.speaker: JEAN
segments.en: My family and I will be staying in the town that week.

segments.speaker: TIM
segments.en: Of course.
segments.zh: 当然。活动从17号下午的一场音乐会开始。

segments.speaker: TIM
segments.en: Well it starts with a concert on the afternoon of the 17th.

segments.speaker: JEAN
segments.en: Oh I heard about that.
segments.zh: 哦我听说过那个。管弦乐队和歌手来自美国，是吗？

segments.speaker: JEAN
segments.en: The orchestra and singers come from the USA, don't they?

segments.speaker: TIM
segments.en: They're from Canada.
segments.zh: 他们来自加拿大。在那里很受欢迎。他们会演奏一些著名的曲目，大人小孩都会喜欢。

segments.speaker: TIM
segments.en: They're very popular over there.

segments.speaker: TIM
segments.en: They're going to perform a number of well-known pieces that will appeal to children as well as adults.

segments.speaker: JEAN
segments.en: That sounds good.
segments.zh: 听起来不错。我们全家都对音乐感兴趣。

segments.speaker: JEAN
segments.en: My whole family are interested in music.

segments.speaker: TIM
segments.en: The next day, the 18th, there's a performance by a ballet company called Eustatis.
segments.zh: 第二天，也就是18号，有一个叫尤斯塔蒂斯的芭蕾舞团的演出。

segments.speaker: JEAN
segments.en: Sorry?
segments.zh: 不好意思，您说什么？

segments.speaker: TIM
segments.en: The name is spelt E-U-S-T-A-T-I-S.
segments.zh: 名字拼写是E-U-S-T-A-T-I-S。他们去年参加了音乐节，反响很好。而且他们的节目老少皆宜。

segments.speaker: TIM
segments.en: They appeared in last year's festival, and went down very well.

segments.speaker: TIM
segments.en: Again, their programme is designed for all ages.

segments.speaker: JEAN
segments.en: Good.
segments.zh: 好的，我想我们会去看那个。我希望音乐节期间有戏剧演出，最好是喜剧。

segments.speaker: JEAN
segments.en: I expect we'll go to that.

segments.speaker: JEAN
segments.en: I hope there's going to be a play during the festival, a comedy, ideally.

segments.speaker: TIM
segments.en: You're in luck!
segments.zh: 你运气真好！19号和20号，一个本地业余剧团会表演他们自己成员写的一部剧，叫《杰迈玛》。在市政厅上演。他们已经演过两三次了。我本人没看过，但本地报纸的评论很好。

segments.speaker: TIM
segments.en: On the 19th and 20th a local amateur group are performing one written by a member of the group.

segments.speaker: TIM
segments.en: It's called Jemima.

segments.speaker: TIM
segments.en: That'll be on in the town hall.

segments.speaker: TIM
segments.en: They've already performed it two or three times.

segments.speaker: TIM
segments.en: I haven't seen it myself, but the review in the local paper was very good.

segments.speaker: JEAN
segments.en: And is it suitable for children?
segments.zh: 适合孩子看吗？

segments.speaker: TIM
segments.en: Yes, in fact it's aimed more at children than at adults, so both performances are in the afternoon.
segments.zh: 适合，实际上它更针对儿童而不是成人，所以两场演出都在下午。

segments.speaker: JEAN
segments.en: And what about dance?
segments.zh: 那舞蹈呢？有演出吗？

segments.speaker: JEAN
segments.en: Will there be any performances?

segments.speaker: TIM
segments.en: Yes, also on the 20th, but in the evening.
segments.zh: 有的，也在20号，但是晚上。一个专业舞蹈团会上演现代舞作品，配乐是年轻作曲家创作的电子音乐。

segments.speaker: TIM
segments.en: A professional company is putting on a show of modern pieces, with electronic music by young composers.

segments.speaker: JEAN
segments.en: Uh-huh.
segments.zh: 嗯哼。

segments.speaker: TIM
segments.en: The show is about how people communicate, or fail to communicate, with each other, so it's got the rather strange name, Chat.
segments.zh: 这个展览是关于人们如何沟通，或者无法沟通的，所以它有个挺奇怪的名字，叫《聊天》。

segments.speaker: JEAN
segments.en: I suppose that's because that's something we do both face to face and online.
segments.zh: 我想那是因为这是我们面对面和在线都会做的事情。

segments.speaker: TIM
segments.en: That's right.
segments.zh: 没错。

segments.speaker: TIM
segments.en: Now there are also some workshops and other activities.
segments.zh: 现在还有一些工作坊和其他活动。它们每天至少会举办一次，所以每个想参加的人都有机会。

segments.speaker: TIM
segments.en: They'll all take place at least once every day, so everyone who wants to take part will have a chance.

segments.speaker: JEAN
segments.en: Good.
segments.zh: 太好了。我们对烹饪特别感兴趣——你们不会碰巧有烹饪工作坊吧？

segments.speaker: JEAN
segments.en: We're particularly interested in cookery – you don't happen to have a cookery workshop, do you?

segments.speaker: TIM
segments.en: We certainly do.
segments.zh: 当然有。它将专注于如何让食物成为健康生活方式的一部分，并且会展示即使是蛋糕这样的甜食也可以比通常含糖量少得多。

segments.speaker: TIM
segments.en: It's going to focus on how to make food part of a healthy lifestyle, and it'll show that even sweet things like cakes can contain much less sugar than they usually do.

segments.speaker: JEAN
segments.en: That might be worth going to.
segments.zh: 那可能值得一去。我们正试着鼓励孩子们做饭。

segments.speaker: JEAN
segments.en: We're trying to encourage our children to cook.

segments.speaker: TIM
segments.en: Another workshop is just for children, and that's on creating posters to reflect the history of the town.
segments.zh: 另一个工作坊只针对孩子，是关于制作反映小镇历史的海报。目的是让孩子们意识到小镇和人们的生活在几个世纪以来发生了怎样的变化。成果将在社区中心展出。另一个工作坊是玩具制作，只针对成年人。

segments.speaker: TIM
segments.en: The aim is to make children aware of how both the town and people's lives have changed over the centuries.

segments.speaker: TIM
segments.en: The results will be exhibited in the community centre.

segments.speaker: TIM
segments.en: Then the other workshop is in toy-making, and that's for adults only.

segments.speaker: JEAN
segments.en: Oh, why's that?
segments.zh: 哦，为什么？

segments.speaker: TIM
segments.en: Because it involves carpentry – participants will be making toys out of wood, so there'll be a lot of sharp chisels and other tools around.
segments.zh: 因为涉及木工活——参与者要用木头做玩具，所以周围会有很多锋利的凿子和其他工具。

segments.speaker: JEAN
segments.en: It makes sense to keep children away from it.
segments.zh: 让孩子远离它是合理的。

segments.speaker: TIM
segments.en: Exactly.
segments.zh: 没错。现在让我告诉你一些户外活动。会有有监督的野外游泳……

segments.speaker: TIM
segments.en: Now let me tell you about some of the outdoor activities.

segments.speaker: TIM
segments.en: There'll be supervised wild swimming ...

segments.speaker: JEAN
segments.en: Wild swimming?
segments.zh: 野外游泳？那是什么？

segments.speaker: JEAN
segments.en: What's that?

segments.speaker: TIM
segments.en: It just means swimming in natural waters, rather than a swimming pool.
segments.zh: 就是在自然水域游泳，而不是游泳池。

segments.speaker: JEAN
segments.en: Oh OK.
segments.zh: 哦，好的。比如在湖里。

segments.speaker: JEAN
segments.en: In a lake, for instance.

segments.speaker: TIM
segments.en: Yes, there's a beautiful one just outside the town, and that'll be the venue for the swimming.
segments.zh: 是的，城外就有一个美丽的湖，那就是游泳的场地。会有救生员值班，所以适合所有年龄段。最后，每天都会在附近的树林里散步。领队是昆虫专家。他会展示一些生活在树林里的昆虫，以及它们对环境的重要性。所以节日期间会有各种各样的事情可做。

segments.speaker: TIM
segments.en: There'll be lifeguards on duty, so it's suitable for all ages.

segments.speaker: TIM
segments.en: And finally, there'll be a walk in some nearby woods every day.

segments.speaker: TIM
segments.en: The leader is an expert on insects.

segments.speaker: TIM
segments.en: He'll show some that live in the woods, and how important they are for the environment.

segments.speaker: TIM
segments.en: So there are going to be all sorts of different things to do during the festival.

segments.speaker: JEAN
segments.en: There certainly are.
segments.zh: 确实有很多。

segments.speaker: TIM
segments.en: If you'd like to read about how the preparations for the festival are going, the festival organiser is keeping a blog.
segments.zh: 如果您想了解节日的筹备情况，节日组织者正在写博客。上网搜索节日网站就能找到。

segments.speaker: TIM
segments.en: Just search online for the festival website, and you'll find it.

segments.speaker: JEAN
segments.en: Well, thank you very much for all the information.
segments.zh: 好的，非常感谢您提供的所有信息。

segments.speaker: TIM
segments.en: You're welcome.
segments.zh: 不客气。再见。

segments.speaker: TIM
segments.en: Goodbye.

segments.speaker: JEAN
segments.en: Goodbye.
segments.zh: 再见。

items.prompt: Complete the table below. Write ONE WORD ONLY for each answer.

pairs.note: 题干中的'ballet company'在原文中完全一致，直接定位到答案所在位置。
题干中的'called'在原文中完全一致，引出公司名称。

paraphrase.explain: 通过题干中的'ballet company called'在原文中找到完全相同的短语，后面紧跟的'Eustatis'即为答案。

items.prompt: Complete the notes below. Write ONE WORD ONLY for each answer.

pairs.note: 原文直接出现'review'，与答案完全一致。

paraphrase.explain: 题干要求填写一个词，定位句提到'the review in the local paper was very good'，其中'review'就是答案。
